untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time inventory levels, production pipeline lead times, demand growth rates, and storage cost data. These are fundamental/supply-chain metrics not available in standard OHLCV technical indicators. Cannot accurately map 'inventory percentile', 'pipeline_days', 'demand_zscore', or 'storage_cost_pct' to allowed indicators. Approximated using price_pos_20 (proxy for inventory pressure via price position) and hvol_20 (proxy for volatility from supply disruption), but this is a lossy conversion.
translation_notes: Original signal is fundamentally a supply-chain microstructure play requiring external data feeds (inventory reports, production schedules, commodity storage costs). Used price_pos_20 as a rough proxy for inventory stress (low price position = potential shortage pressure) and hvol_20 as proxy for demand volatility shock. Entry logic: price near 2-year lows (0.30 percentile) AND elevated volatility. Exit when price recovers to median (0.50). Direction set to LONG (buying the dislocation). This is a significantly degraded approximation of the intended signal.
